svg.text: Why FAST PATH? What's Inside a Variant Node
Most population genetics tools need population summaries, not individual genotypes
(2 bits per sample, 4 samples per byte)
The Key Insight: What Do Downstream Tools Actually Need?
None of these tools need individual genotypes!
FAST PATH: read K pre-computed values directly
FULL PATH: unpack N genotypes from gt_packed
Why It Matters: Scaling with Sample Count
TreeMix Export: FULL PATH vs FAST PATH
